creator: marklmi26-fbsd@yahoo.com
text:
Now that I've again booted from the ZFS environment where I'd
done a bulk -a build (under main [so: 15]):

tail /usr/local/poudriere/data/logs/bulk/main-amd64-bulk_a-default/2023-11-01_07h14m50s/logs/rdkit-2023.09.1.log

So, no crash for my build.
